subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the soul that hath been touched by tribulation and adversity in the path of God, the Lord of Names, for verily it standeth among the most exalted of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لنفس مستها الباساء و الضراء فی سبیل الله مالک الاسماء انه من اعلی الخلق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
